title: How much is my website worth?
body:
My websites and blogs are not worth much compared to the [0.82 billion Euros worth Google](http://www.wiriki.net/?u=http://www.google.com&Submit=Generar+informe) according to [Wiriki](http://www.wiriki.net), a very useful tool that, in addition to analyzing various aspects of your site such as CSS validation, XHTML, or how you have it indexed in the different search engines, gives you an economic value your site. Check it out right here:

Url:      

How much is yours worth?
